on_screen_text:
Client समोर... फक्त यामुळे अपमान झाला कारण मला English येत नव्हती. [In front of the client... insulted only because I didn't know English.]
Boss म्हणाला: पुढच्या वेळी तू बोलू नको. [Boss said: Don't speak next time.]
त्या दिवशी ठरवलं... अपमानालाच माझी Motivation बनवायचं. [Decided that day... to make insult my motivation.]
पैसे नव्हते, English Classes लावायला. [Had no money to join English classes.]
म्हणून विचार केला... AI सोबत English शिकायची. [So thought... to learn English with AI.]
My Sivi App वर, AI सोबत तास-न-तास बोलत राहिलो. [On My Sivi App, kept talking with AI for hours.]
AI ने मला, माझ्या मराठी भाषेतूनच English शिकवली. [AI taught me English through my Marathi language.]
चुका झाल्या तरी, कोणी मला judge केलं नाही... आणि मी बोलायला शिकलो. [Even if mistakes were made, no one judged me... and I learned to speak.]
काही दिवसांत... Client ने मोठा Order दिला. [In a few days... Client gave a big order.]
आणि Boss म्हणाला: Sorry...and Good job [And Boss said: Sorry...and Good job]
तुम्हीही English मुळे मागे पडता आहात का? [Are you also falling behind because of English?]
तर My Sivi App वर फक्त ₹३ पासून आपली English शिकण्याची जर्नी सुरू करा. [Then start your English learning journey on My Sivi App from just ₹3.]
summary: An animated story depicts an employee humiliated by his boss for poor English skills. Unable to afford classes, he uses the My Sivi App to practice speaking English with an AI in Marathi without judgment. He successfully improves, wins a major client order, earns his boss's respect, and invites viewers to start learning for just ₹3.
